basePrompt: Completely original muscular martial artist in classic anime action style. Athletic powerful build, dynamic fighting stance, bold lines, vibrant colors, strong energy aura, expressive face, dramatic motion, high quality 2D anime illustration on clean background.
avoid: Do not copy existing franchise characters, names, logos, symbols, outfits, hairstyles or transformation forms. Avoid direct references to famous characters, text, watermark and brand references.
